summary: Project Instance floating DFM windows now show dirty state and support shell save commands.
details: Floating DFM windows inside Project Instance display an unsaved-changes dot, keep that marker when minimized, mark the containing Project Instance shell tab dirty, and ask before closing with unsaved changes.
File Save, File Save As, Ctrl+S, and Ctrl+Shift+S now route to the active floating DFM window when Project Instance is the active shell tab.
